LCC-HS10-L1-13001400-HSSCILIFE-CMF-AAD-02 • HS Science: Life Science • Feedback Mechanisms and Homeostasis

The Yaa File

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What is the main thing the students are trying to figure out?
2QUESTION 2: According to the girl, why did Ama’s sweat response shut off?
3QUESTION 3: What do the students conclude about what reset Ama’s cooling system?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Locate the line that names the breakdown signal. Locate the line that traces the shutdown to its cause. Locate the line that identifies what the team did to restart the mechanism.
